name: tandem-methodology
description: Tandem methodology for Claude Code — the TEP→Spec→Slice skills (spec-prepare, slice, tep, board, retro, methodology-context, repo-conventions), the explorer/reviewer/verifier subagents, the ownership-guard hook, and the orchestrator's editable prompt-template doctrine (templates/). The thinkube-kanban board MCP server is provided by the thinkube-tandem extension, not bundled here.
